welcome.intro_subtitle: Welcome to AI PEER. We'll help you personalize your experience in just a few simple steps.
welcome.text_size_subtitle: Select a comfortable reading size that works best for you
welcome.text_preview_note: *Preview adjusts as you change text size.
welcome.contrast_subtitle: Pick colors and contrast that are easy on your eyes
welcome.contrast_preview_note: *Preview shows your chosen contrast and colors.
welcome.language_subtitle: Choose your language for the app
welcome.sound_subtitle: Enable or disable alert sounds for notifications
welcome.sound_preview_note: *Toggle sound alerts and play a short preview (uses vibration on device or beep on web).
welcome.preview_text: Welcome to AI PEER! This is a preview of your settings.
welcome.preview_text_es: Welcome to AI PEER! This is a preview of your settings.
welcome.preview_text_ht: Welcome to AI PEER! This is a preview of your settings.

settings.display_contrast_desc: Choose colors that are easy on your eyes
settings.logout_confirm_body: Are you sure you want to logout?

chatHistory.title: Chat History
chatHistory.delete_body: Are you sure you want to delete this conversation?

auth.already_have_account: Already have an account? Sign in
auth.no_account: Don't have an account? Create an account
auth.forgot_password_body: Password reset will be available soon. Please contact support for now.
auth.invalid_phone: Enter a valid phone number (10+ digits).
auth.invalid_password: Password must be at least 6 characters.

verify.subtitle: Enter the 6-digit code sent to your phone
verify.request_new_code_body: To request a new code, please go back and enter your credentials again.

tutorial.step_1_desc: See your latest fall-risk summary, questionnaire access, and activity overview in one place.
tutorial.step_1_note: Demo image placeholder: Home dashboard screenshot
tutorial.step_2_desc: Answer the fall concern questionnaire to keep your FRA matrix aligned with your latest responses.
tutorial.step_2_note: Demo image placeholder: Questionnaire flow screenshot
tutorial.step_3_desc: Start guided exercises and use AI Chat for reminders and fall-prevention tips.
tutorial.step_3_note: Demo image placeholder: Exercise and chat screenshot

modelDownload.title: Download AI Model
modelDownload.description: To use AI Chat, we need to download the language model to your device. This only happens once.
modelDownload.privacy_note: All AI processing happens on your device. Your conversations never leave your phone.

fraMatrix.title: Today's Risk (FRA)
fraMatrix.subtitle: Based on alignment of physical fall risk (BTrackS) and perceived fall risk (FES-I).
fraMatrix.update_body: Enter your new BTrackS score in cm:
